mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_download (material_id, user_id, source, create_time) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{userId}, #{source}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT create_time AS month_value FROM material_download ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT mi.title AS material_name, COUNT(md.id) AS download_count FROM material_download md LEFT JOIN material_info mi ON mi.id = md.material_id GROUP BY md.material_id, mi.title ORDER BY download_count DESC LIMIT 5
